title: ED headache documentation

red_flags.text: Provides systemic, neurologic, onset, associated-feature, and pattern-change red-flag domains.
red_flags.rationale: The exact DHA red-flag section supports onset, severity, associated symptoms, relevant negatives, risk context and time-critical symptoms only when assessed; it does not infer a secondary cause.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Provides systemic, neurologic, onset, associated-feature, and pattern-change red-flag domains.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Headaches in Adults

red_flags.text: Identifies headache presentations requiring urgent face-to-face assessment.
red_flags.rationale: The exact emergency-evaluation section supports recording measured vital data, focused assessment, appearance, existing results, escalation and specialist discussion only when clinician-completed.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Identifies headache presentations requiring urgent face-to-face assessment.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Headaches in Adults

red_flags.text: Defines adult headache telehealth scope in DHA-licensed facilities and emergency exclusions.
red_flags.rationale: The adult virtual-care scope was reviewed; pediatric, pregnancy, trauma and established neurological diagnoses require separate evidence.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines adult headache telehealth scope in DHA-licensed facilities and emergency exclusions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Headaches in Adults

source_limitations: Detailed onset and phenotype, prior history, pregnancy/postpartum, trauma, neurological and fundoscopic examination, tests, diagnosis, treatment, reassessment and disposition remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
